series_metadata.series_title: Contract Management and Interagency Agreement Files
series_metadata.series_description: These records are but not limited to, Purchase Orders, Contracts, grants, requests for proposal and interagency agreements with social service agencies, and the federal and local governments to administer Temporary Assistance to Needy Families (TANF), Temporary Emergency Food Assistance Program (TEFAP), Ohio Works First (OWF), Food Stamps (FS), Disability Financial Assistance (DFA), Prevention, Retention, and Contingency (PRC) programs of ODJFS to eligible recipients. Files include contractor selection documentation, deliverables, and performance evaluations. Examples of services provided are: health screening, Parenting Pregency, English as a second language and job seeking assistance to help refugees become assimilated into society; grants for food banks; drug and alcohol treatment for TANF eligible recipients; help me grow services assistance for children of incarcerated parents; and rehabilitation services.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in office and 5 years in records center ; Electronic: in office 5 years
